_publications._publicationTitle: Merlin deficiency predicts FAK inhibitor sensitivity: a synthetic lethal relationship.

_contextSnippet: We observed 2–3 fold induction of caspase3/7 activity in response to VS-4718 treatment in a panel of human Merlin-negative MPM cell lines, Mero-41, Mero-48a and Mero-83
details: Induced 2-3 fold caspase3/7 activity in Merlin-negative MPM cell lines (Mero-41, Mero-48a, Mero-83) with only weak activation in Merlin-positive cells
